name: 02 Enrich With LLM
description: Runnable template and callable sub-workflow: validate a NormalizedTextObject, consume optional nearest-match context from the pre-LLM Qdrant stage, call an OpenAI-compatible chat completions API, and merge compatibility score/category/tags/summary/reason plus structured scoring fields back onto the same object.

parameters.jsCode:
return [
  {
    json: {
      item_id: '6d6e2f96ab2c',
      source_type: 'rss',
      source_name: 'OpenAI YouTube',
      canonical_url: 'https://example.com/post',
      title: 'Example normalized item',
      author: 'OpenAI',
      published_at: '2026-04-17T09:00:00-04:00',
      ingested_at: '2026-04-17T09:05:00-04:00',
      media_type: 'text',
      content_text: 'Normalized plain text content for scoring and summary. The article explains why stable object contracts, idempotent IDs, and a single Obsidian write target are required before the project adds more ingestion paths.',
      privacy_level: 'public',
      external_llm_allowed: true,
      content_hash: 'sha256:example',
      upstream_summary: '',
      tags: ['inbox', 'ai-information-processor'],
      dedupe_action: 'full_push',
      status: 'raw'
    }
  }
];
